haiku45.summary_excerpt: Incomplete deliverable: workflow references tests/fixtures/* (don't exist)—pytest step will fail. Actions unpinned (@v4/@v5 vs SHA, security issue). Code missing input validation, type hints on main(). Workflow redundant test steps (35-44 repeat same pattern). Not production-ready.

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Professional implementation with excellent Python idioms (itertools, dataclasses) and robust GHA workflow. The matrix generator correctly flattens logic into an 'include'-only structure. Workflow includes thorough validation, pinned actions, and least-privilege permissions.
